name: 易經 · Leibniz Binary Tree of Change (Lines → Trigrams → Hexagrams)
description:
The I Ching mapped as a 6-dimensional binary hypercube, following the insight Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz had in 1703 when he recognized the Fu Xi/Shao Yong hexagram sequence as binary counting from 0 (坤 Kun, all yin) to 63 (乾 Qian, all yang). 384 individual lines serve as transformation edges — when a line changes, it flips one bit and transforms one hexagram into another. The 64 hexagrams are vertices of the hypercube, connected by their 6 lines to 6 neighboring hexagrams. 8 trigrams represent the 3-bit building blocks. Each hexagram carries 7 historical relationship systems in its metadata: 綜卦 (inverse), 錯卦 (complement), 互卦 (nuclear), 序卦 (King Wen pair), 京房八宮 (Jing Fang's Eight Palaces), 馬王堆 (Mawangdui sequence), and 雜卦傳 (Miscellaneous Notes pairings). All hexagram text is classical Chinese from Project Gutenberg eBook #25501.

Source: Project Gutenberg eBook #25501 (https://www.gutenberg.org/ebooks/25501)

PUBLIC DOMAIN ILLUSTRATION REFERENCES: The Leibniz-Bouvet diagram (1703) showing the 64 hexagrams arranged in binary order, housed at the Niedersächsische Landesbibliothek, Hanover. Shao Yong's Xiantian circular arrangement from various Song dynasty editions. [Data note, Jul 17 2026: this grammar is a DUPLICATE of adefc983-d903-4af9-8fec-c14531ee96db (identical items; only the hexagram level field differs — this copy uses level 2, the other the more sensible level 3).]
author: PlayfulProcess

sections.Nature:
陽 (yáng): 天、剛、動、明、父
Yang: Heaven, firmness, movement, light, the father principle.

The yang line is solid and unbroken (⚊). It represents the active, creative, initiating force in the cosmos. In Leibniz's binary notation, yang = 1. In a hexagram, yang lines push upward and outward.
sections.繫辭傳: 天尊地卑，乾坤定矣。卑高以陳，貴賤位矣。動靜有常，剛柔斷矣。一陰一陽之謂道。乾道成男，坤道成女。乾知大始，坤作成物。剛健中正，純粹精也。
sections.Brief Translation: Heaven is lofty, Earth is low; thus Qian and Kun are determined. The high and low are displayed, and the noble and humble have their places. Movement and rest have their constancy; the firm and yielding are thus distinguished. The alternation of yin and yang is called the Dao. The way of Qian forms the male; the way of Kun forms the female. Qian knows the great beginning; Kun brings things to completion. Firm, strong, centered, and correct — this is pure essence.

sections.Nature:
陰 (yīn): 地、柔、靜、暗、母
Yin: Earth, yielding, stillness, darkness, the mother principle.

The yin line is broken (⚋), split in the middle. It represents the receptive, nurturing, completing force in the cosmos. In Leibniz's binary notation, yin = 0. Where yang initiates, yin brings to completion.
sections.繫辭傳: 坤至柔而動也剛，至靜而德方。後得主而有常，含萬物而化光。坤道其順乎，承天而時行。坤厚載物，德合無疆。含弘光大，品物咸亨。
sections.Brief Translation: Kun is most soft yet moves with firmness; most still yet its virtue is square. It follows and finds its lord, maintaining constancy. It contains the ten thousand things and transforms with brilliance. How compliant is the way of Kun! It receives heaven and acts in season. Kun is thick and carries all things; its virtue merges with the boundless. Containing, magnifying, illuminating, enlarging — all things flourish through it.

sections.Nature:
地 (Earth) · 母 (Mother) · 西南 (Southwest) · 腹 (Belly)

Three yin lines: pure receptive force, total openness. Earth's nature is to receive and to carry. Leibniz value 0 — the origin, the empty ground from which all emerges.
sections.Structure:
⚋ 陰 yin (top)
⚋ 陰 yin (middle)
⚋ 陰 yin (bottom)

三陰 — Three yin lines. Binary 000. Pure receptive force.
sections.說卦傳: 坤為地、為母、為布、為釜、為吝嗇、為均、為子母牛、為大輿、為文、為眾、為柄。其於地也，為黑。坤，順也。
sections.Brief Translation: Kun is earth, is the mother, is cloth, is a cauldron, is thrift, is levelness, is a cow with calf, is a great cart, is pattern, is the multitude, is a handle. Among soils, it is black. Kun means yielding, devoted.

sections.Nature:
山 (Mountain) · 少男 (Youngest Son) · 東北 (Northeast) · 手 (Hand)

Yang resting atop two yin: movement that has come to rest. Leibniz value 1 — the first differentiation from pure yin.
sections.Structure:
⚊ 陽 yang (top)
⚋ 陰 yin (middle)
⚋ 陰 yin (bottom)

一陽止二陰上 — One yang atop two yin. Binary 001.
sections.說卦傳: 艮為山、為徑路、為小石、為門闕、為果蓏、為閽寺、為指、為狗、為鼠、為黔喙之屬。其於木也，為堅多節。艮，止也。
sections.Brief Translation: Gen is mountain, is a bypath, is small stones, is a gate or watchtower, is fruits and gourds, is a gatekeeper, is the finger, is the dog, is the rat, is black-billed birds. Among trees, it is firm with many knots. Gen means stopping, keeping still.

sections.Nature:
水 (Water) · 中男 (Middle Son) · 北 (North) · 耳 (Ear)

Yang trapped between two yin: light enclosed in darkness. Leibniz value 2 — danger and depth, the way through obstacles.
sections.Structure:
⚋ 陰 yin (top)
⚊ 陽 yang (middle)
⚋ 陰 yin (bottom)

一陽陷二陰 — One yang between two yin. Binary 010.
sections.說卦傳: 坎為水、為溝瀆、為隱伏、為矯輮、為弓輪。其於人也，為加憂、為心病、為耳痛、為血卦、為赤。其於馬也，為美脊、為亟心、為下首、為薄蹄、為曳。其於輿也，為多眚。為通、為月、為盜。其於木也，為堅多心。坎，陷也。
sections.Brief Translation: Kan is water, is ditches and channels, is concealment, is bending and straightening, is the bow and wheel. For people, it is added worry, heart sickness, earache; it is the blood trigram, is red. Among horses, it is one with fine spine, anxious heart, drooping head, thin hooves, that stumbles. Among carts, it has many defects. It is penetration, the moon, the thief. Among trees, it is firm with much pith. Kan means falling in, the pit.

sections.Nature:
風/木 (Wind/Wood) · 長女 (Eldest Daughter) · 東南 (Southeast) · 股 (Thigh)

Yin yielding beneath two yang: gentle penetration from below. Leibniz value 3 — what force cannot break, persistent gentleness penetrates.
sections.Structure:
⚊ 陽 yang (top)
⚊ 陽 yang (middle)
⚋ 陰 yin (bottom)

一陰入二陽下 — One yin beneath two yang. Binary 011.
sections.說卦傳: 巽為木、為風、為長女、為繩直、為工、為白、為長、為高、為進退、為不果、為臭。其於人也，為寡髮、為廣顙、為多白眼、為近利市三倍。其究為躁卦。巽，入也。
sections.Brief Translation: Xun is wood, is wind, is the eldest daughter, is the plumb line, is the carpenter, is white, is long, is high, is advancing and retreating, is indecision, is smell. For people, it is thin hair, wide forehead, much white in the eyes, and profit close to threefold in the market. Its ultimate meaning is the trigram of restlessness. Xun means entering, penetrating gently.

sections.Nature:
雷 (Thunder) · 長男 (Eldest Son) · 東 (East) · 足 (Foot)

One yang below two yin: yang energy bursts forth from beneath the earth. Leibniz value 4 — thunder shakes and awakens.
sections.Structure:
⚋ 陰 yin (top)
⚋ 陰 yin (middle)
⚊ 陽 yang (bottom)

一陽二陰 — One yang rising beneath two yin. Binary 100.
sections.說卦傳: 震為雷、為龍、為玄黃、為旉、為大塗、為長子、為決躁、為蒼筤竹、為萑葦。其於馬也，為善鳴、為馵足、為作足、為的顙。其於稼也，為反生。其究為健，為蕃鮮。震，動也。
sections.Brief Translation: Zhen is thunder, is the dragon, is dark yellow, is spreading, is a great road, is the eldest son, is decisiveness and restlessness, is green young bamboo, is reeds and rushes. Among horses, it is one that neighs well, has white hind legs, gallops, has a white forehead. Among crops, it is one that grows back. Its ultimate meaning is strength, luxuriant freshness. Zhen means movement, arousal.

sections.Nature:
火 (Fire) · 中女 (Middle Daughter) · 南 (South) · 目 (Eye)

Yin held between two yang: darkness within brightness. Leibniz value 5 — clarity requires something to illuminate.
sections.Structure:
⚊ 陽 yang (top)
⚋ 陰 yin (middle)
⚊ 陽 yang (bottom)

一陰麗二陽中 — One yin between two yang. Binary 101.
sections.說卦傳: 離為火、為日、為電、為中女、為甲胄、為戈兵。其於人也，為大腹。為乾卦。為鱉、為蟹、為蠃、為蚌、為龜。其於木也，為科上槁。離，麗也。
sections.Brief Translation: Li is fire, is the sun, is lightning, is the middle daughter, is armor and helmets, is spears and weapons. For people, it is a large belly. It is the trigram of dryness. It is the turtle, the crab, the snail, the mussel, the tortoise. Among trees, it is hollow above and dry. Li means clinging, brightness, beauty.

sections.Nature:
澤 (Lake) · 少女 (Youngest Daughter) · 西 (West) · 口 (Mouth)

Yin resting atop two yang: openness above strength. Leibniz value 6 — joy, exchange, and the pleasure of gathering together.
sections.Structure:
⚋ 陰 yin (top)
⚊ 陽 yang (middle)
⚊ 陽 yang (bottom)

一陰悅二陽上 — One yin opening above two yang. Binary 110.
sections.說卦傳: 兌為澤、為少女、為巫、為口舌、為毀折、為附決。其於地也，為剛鹵。為妾、為羊。兌，說也。
sections.Brief Translation: Dui is the lake/marsh, is the youngest daughter, is the shaman/sorceress, is the mouth and tongue, is breaking and destroying, is bursting open. Among soils, it is hard and salty. It is the concubine, is the sheep. Dui means joy, delight, speaking.

sections.Nature:
天 (Heaven) · 父 (Father) · 西北 (Northwest) · 首 (Head)

Three yang lines rising: pure creative force, undivided strength. Leibniz value 7 — the maximum, heaven moves ceaselessly.
sections.Structure:
⚊ 陽 yang (top)
⚊ 陽 yang (middle)
⚊ 陽 yang (bottom)

三陽 — Three yang lines. Binary 111. Pure creative force.
sections.說卦傳: 乾為天、為圜、為君、為父、為玉、為金、為寒、為冰、為大赤、為良馬、為老馬、為瘠馬、為駁馬、為木果。乾，健也。
sections.Brief Translation: Qian is heaven, is round, is the ruler, is the father, is jade, is metal, is cold, is ice, is deep red, is a good horse, an old horse, a lean horse, a piebald horse, is tree fruit. Qian means strong, untiring.

sections.Image: 地勢坤，君子以厚德載物。
sections.Judgment: 元，亨，利牝馬之貞。君子有攸往，先迷後得主，利西南得朋，東北喪朋。安貞，吉。
sections.Trigrams:
上卦 (Upper): ☷ 坤 Earth (Kūn)
下卦 (Lower): ☷ 坤 Earth (Kūn)

sections.Image: 山附于地，剝；上以厚下，安宅。
sections.Trigrams:
上卦 (Upper): ☶ 艮 Mountain (Gèn)
下卦 (Lower): ☷ 坤 Earth (Kūn)

sections.Image: 地上有水，比；先王以建萬國，親諸侯。
sections.Judgment: 吉。原筮元永貞，無咎。不寧方來，後夫凶。
sections.Trigrams:
上卦 (Upper): ☵ 坎 Water (Kǎn)
下卦 (Lower): ☷ 坤 Earth (Kūn)

sections.Image: 風行地上，觀；先王以省方，觀民設教。
sections.Trigrams:
上卦 (Upper): ☴ 巽 Wind (Xùn)
下卦 (Lower): ☷ 坤 Earth (Kūn)

sections.Image: 雷出地奮，豫。先王以作樂崇德，殷薦之上帝，以配祖考。
sections.Trigrams:
上卦 (Upper): ☳ 震 Thunder (Zhèn)
下卦 (Lower): ☷ 坤 Earth (Kūn)

sections.Image: 澤上於地，萃；君子以除戎器，戒不虞。
sections.Judgment: 亨。王假有廟，利見大人，亨，利貞。用大牲吉，利有攸往。
sections.Trigrams:

下卦 (Lower): ☷ 坤 Earth (Kūn)

sections.Image: 天地不交，否；君子以儉德辟難，不可榮以祿。

sections.Trigrams:

sections.Image: 山上有水，蹇；君子以反身修德。

sections.Judgment: 亨，利貞，可小事，不可大事。飛鳥遺之音，不宜上宜下，大吉。

sections.Image: 山上有火，旅；君子以明慎用刑，而不留獄。

sections.Image: 天下有山，遯；君子以遠小人，不惡而嚴。

sections.Image: 山下出泉，蒙；君子以果行育德。
sections.Judgment: 亨。匪我求童蒙，童蒙求我。初噬告，再三瀆，瀆則不告。利貞。
sections.Trigrams:

下卦 (Lower): ☵ 坎 Water (Kǎn)

sections.Image: 水洊至，習坎；君子以常德行，習教事。

sections.Trigrams:

下卦 (Lower): ☵ 坎 Water (Kǎn)

sections.Image: 風行水上，渙；先王以享于帝立廟。

sections.Trigrams:
上卦 (Upper): ☴ 巽 Wind (Xùn)
下卦 (Lower): ☵ 坎 Water (Kǎn)

sections.Image: 雷雨作，解；君子以赦過宥罪。
sections.Judgment: 利西南，無所往，其來復吉。有攸往，夙吉。
sections.Trigrams:
上卦 (Upper): ☳ 震 Thunder (Zhèn)
下卦 (Lower): ☵ 坎 Water (Kǎn)

sections.Image: 火在水上，未濟；君子以慎辨物居方。
sections.Judgment: 亨，小狐汔濟，濡其尾，無攸利。

上卦 (Upper): ☲ 離 Fire (Lí)
下卦 (Lower): ☵ 坎 Water (Kǎn)

sections.Image: 澤無水，困；君子以致命遂志。
sections.Judgment: 亨，貞，大人吉，無咎，有言不信。
sections.Trigrams:
上卦 (Upper): ☱ 兌 Lake (Duì)
下卦 (Lower): ☵ 坎 Water (Kǎn)

sections.Image: 天與水違行，訟；君子以作事謀始。

sections.Trigrams:
上卦 (Upper): ☰ 乾 Heaven (Qián)
下卦 (Lower): ☵ 坎 Water (Kǎn)

sections.Image: 地中生木，升；君子以順德，積小以高大。

下卦 (Lower): ☴ 巽 Wind (Xùn)

sections.Image: 山下有風，蠱；君子以振民育德。
sections.Judgment: 元亨，利涉大川。先甲三日，後甲三日。
sections.Trigrams:
上卦 (Upper): ☶ 艮 Mountain (Gèn)
下卦 (Lower): ☴ 巽 Wind (Xùn)

sections.Image: 木上有水，井；君子以勞民勸相。

sections.Judgment: 亨。震來虩虩，笑言啞啞。震驚百里，不喪匕鬯。

下卦 (Lower): ☳ 震 Thunder (Zhèn)

下卦 (Lower): ☰ 乾 Heaven (Qián)

sections.Image: 天行健，君子以自強不息。潛龍勿用，陽在下也。見龍在田，德施普也。終日乾乾，反復道也。或躍在淵，進無咎也。飛龍在天，大人造也。亢龍有悔，盈不可久也。
